proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `braf_v600e=1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `braf_v600e=0`, and `lineage=skin` cell lines are also enriched for more negative `dependency_BRAF`.
Cell lines with `egfr_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than non-amplified cell lines, with the strongest dependency among high-growth EGFR-amplified lines.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison of dependency_BRAF for braf_v600e=1 versus braf_v600e=0.
analyses.result_summary: `braf_v600e=1` lines had mean `dependency_BRAF` -0.8047 versus -0.2495 in `braf_v600e=0` lines; the signed difference was -0.5552.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison of dependency_BRAF for lineage=skin versus all other lineages.
analyses.result_summary: `lineage=skin` lines had mean `dependency_BRAF` -0.4721 versus -0.2938 in other lineages; the signed difference was -0.1783.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison of dependency_EGFR for egfr_amplification=1 versus egfr_amplification=0.
analyses.result_summary: `egfr_amplification=1` lines had mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.6010 versus -0.2524 in non-amplified lines; the signed difference was -0.3486.

analyses.code: Subgroup comparison for egfr_amplification=1 and growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964 versus all other lines.
analyses.result_summary: High-growth EGFR-amplified lines had mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.6253 versus -0.2727 in the complement; the signed difference was -0.3526.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `erbb2_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than non-amplified lines, including ERBB2-amplified breast lines.
Cell lines with `kras_mutation=1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than KRAS-wildtype lines, with pancreatic and colorectal lineages showing enrichment.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison of dependency_ERBB2 for erbb2_amplification=1 versus erbb2_amplification=0.
analyses.result_summary: `erbb2_amplification=1` lines had mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.6856 versus -0.2535 in non-amplified lines; the signed difference was -0.4321.

analyses.code: Subgroup comparison for lineage=breast and erbb2_amplification=1 versus all other lines.
analyses.result_summary: ERBB2-amplified breast lines had mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.7027 versus -0.2864 in the complement; the signed difference was -0.4163.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison of dependency_KRAS for kras_mutation=1 versus kras_mutation=0.
analyses.result_summary: `kras_mutation=1` lines had mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.5594 versus -0.2520 in KRAS-wildtype lines; the signed difference was -0.3075.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison of dependency_KRAS for lineage=pancreatic versus all other lineages.
analyses.result_summary: `lineage=pancreatic` lines had mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.4260 versus -0.3133 in other lineages; the signed difference was -0.1127.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `nf1_loss=1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than `nf1_loss=0` lines, and `lineage=brain` plus `nf1_loss=1` defines a stronger RIT1-dependent subgroup.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison of dependency_RIT1 for nf1_loss=1 versus nf1_loss=0.
analyses.result_summary: `nf1_loss=1` lines had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.3527 versus -0.2572 in `nf1_loss=0` lines; the signed difference was -0.0955.

analyses.code: Subgroup comparison for lineage=brain and nf1_loss=1 versus all other lines.
analyses.result_summary: Brain lineage lines with `nf1_loss=1` had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.4047 versus -0.2650 in the complement; the signed difference was -0.1397.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `lineage=colorectal`, `apc_mutation=1`, or high `wnt_activity_score` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison of dependency_KIF18A for lineage=colorectal versus all other lineages.
analyses.result_summary: `lineage=colorectal` lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.7204 versus -0.2524 in other lineages; the signed difference was -0.4680.

analyses.code: Simple linear regression of dependency_KIF18A on wnt_activity_score.
analyses.result_summary: `wnt_activity_score` had a negative slope for `dependency_KIF18A`; each one-unit increase corresponded to -0.1056 lower dependency score.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison of dependency_KIF18A for apc_mutation=1 versus apc_mutation=0.
analyses.result_summary: `apc_mutation=1` lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.5447 versus -0.2526 in `apc_mutation=0` lines; the signed difference was -0.2921.

analyses.code: Pairwise interaction contrast for lineage=colorectal and apc_mutation=1 on dependency_KIF18A.
analyses.result_summary: The `lineage=colorectal` by `apc_mutation=1` interaction was strongly negative: colorectal APC-mutant lines averaged -0.9425 while the other three cells were near -0.2592, -0.2534, and -0.2523.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within `lineage=colorectal`, the subgroup `apc_mutation=1` and `smad4_loss=0` has much more negative `dependency_KIF18A`, while `smad4_loss=1` suppresses this KIF18A dependency.
Within `lineage=colorectal`, high `wnt_activity_score` plus `smad4_loss=0` has more negative `dependency_KIF18A`, while high `wnt_activity_score` plus `smad4_loss=1` does not.

analyses.code: Subgroup comparison for lineage=colorectal, apc_mutation=1, smad4_loss=0 versus all other lines.
analyses.result_summary: `lineage=colorectal & apc_mutation=1 & smad4_loss=0` lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.0922 versus -0.2527 in the complement; the signed difference was -0.8396.

analyses.code: Subgroup comparison for lineage=colorectal, apc_mutation=1, smad4_loss=1 versus all other lines.
analyses.result_summary: `lineage=colorectal & apc_mutation=1 & smad4_loss=1` lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.2516 versus -0.3076 in the complement; the signed difference was +0.0560, opposite the expected dependency direction.

analyses.code: Pairwise interaction contrast for lineage=colorectal and smad4_loss=1 on dependency_KIF18A.
analyses.result_summary: `smad4_loss=1` suppressed the colorectal KIF18A signal: colorectal/SMAD4-intact lines averaged -0.8255, whereas colorectal/SMAD4-loss lines averaged -0.2501; the interaction contrast was +0.5714.

analyses.code: Subgroup comparison for lineage=colorectal, wnt_activity_score>=0.819, smad4_loss=0 versus all other lines.
analyses.result_summary: `lineage=colorectal & wnt_activity_score>=0.819 & smad4_loss=0` lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.0804 versus -0.2527 in the complement; the signed difference was -0.8277.

analyses.code: Subgroup comparison for lineage=colorectal, wnt_activity_score>=0.819, smad4_loss=1 versus all other lines.
analyses.result_summary: `lineage=colorectal & wnt_activity_score>=0.819 & smad4_loss=1` lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.2563 versus -0.3076 in the complement; the signed difference was +0.0513, indicating the high-WNT signal is lost when `smad4_loss=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` and higher `cas9_activity_score` are associated with more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores, suggesting a screen-quality or proliferation-linked dependency rather than a single molecular subgroup.
Higher `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` is associated with more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores, with proliferation explaining more signal than lineage or mutation subgroups.

analyses.code: Simple linear regression of dependency_TMED10 on growth_rate_doublings_per_day.
analyses.result_summary: `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` had a negative slope for `dependency_TMED10`; each one-unit increase corresponded to -0.1012 lower dependency score.

analyses.code: Simple linear regression of dependency_TMED10 on cas9_activity_score.
analyses.result_summary: `cas9_activity_score` had a negative slope for `dependency_TMED10`; each one-unit increase corresponded to -0.1040 lower dependency score.

analyses.code: Subgroup comparison for cas9_activity_score>=1.080 and growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964 versus all other lines.
analyses.result_summary: High-Cas9, high-growth lines had mean `dependency_TMED10` -0.2931 versus -0.2514 in the complement; the signed difference was -0.0417.

analyses.code: Simple linear regression of dependency_POLR2A on growth_rate_doublings_per_day.
analyses.result_summary: `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` had a strong negative slope for `dependency_POLR2A`; each one-unit increase corresponded to -0.3048 lower dependency score.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison of dependency_POLR2A for growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964 versus lower-growth lines.
analyses.result_summary: Top-quartile growth lines had mean `dependency_POLR2A` -0.4972 versus -0.3928 in other lines; the signed difference was -0.1043.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with high `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` or `myc_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than lower-MYC lines.

Cell lines with high `copy_number_8q24` or `myc_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores, and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` plus `myc_amplification=1` defines the strongest RPL11-dependent subgroup.

analyses.code: Simple linear regression of dependency_DHX9 on rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm.
analyses.result_summary: `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` had a negative slope for `dependency_DHX9`; each one-unit increase corresponded to -0.0161 lower dependency score.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison of dependency_DHX9 for myc_amplification=1 versus myc_amplification=0.
analyses.result_summary: `myc_amplification=1` lines had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.3491 versus -0.3307 in non-amplified lines; the signed difference was -0.0184.

analyses.code: Subgroup comparison for growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964 and rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm>=5.669 versus all other lines.
analyses.result_summary: High-growth, high-MYC-expression lines had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.3892 versus -0.3297 in the complement; the signed difference was -0.0595.

analyses.code: Simple linear regression of dependency_RPL11 on copy_number_8q24.
analyses.result_summary: `copy_number_8q24` had a negative slope for `dependency_RPL11`; each one-unit increase corresponded to -0.1015 lower dependency score.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison of dependency_RPL11 for myc_amplification=1 versus myc_amplification=0.
analyses.result_summary: `myc_amplification=1` lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3614 versus -0.2523 in non-amplified lines; the signed difference was -0.1091.

analyses.code: Subgroup comparison for growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964 and myc_amplification=1 versus all other lines.
analyses.result_summary: High-growth MYC-amplified lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3936 versus -0.2632 in the complement; the signed difference was -0.1303.

proposed_hypotheses.text: For `dependency_BRAF`, pairwise subgroup heterogeneity beyond `braf_v600e=1` is small; `lineage=skin` with `myc_amplification=1` makes `dependency_BRAF` slightly more negative than expected from either feature alone.
For `dependency_EGFR`, `egfr_amplification=1` remains the main subgroup, while low `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` weakens the negative `dependency_EGFR` effect of EGFR amplification.

For `dependency_ERBB2`, `erbb2_amplification=1` remains the main subgroup, with only small exploratory interaction signals such as `lineage=colorectal` plus high `mutation_burden` making `dependency_ERBB2` slightly more negative.
For `dependency_KRAS`, `kras_mutation=1` remains the main subgroup, with a small additional negative interaction for `lineage_subtype=not_applicable` and high `rnaseq_AXL_log2_tpm`.
For `dependency_RIT1`, `nf1_loss=1` remains the main subgroup and `lineage=brain & nf1_loss=1` is the most negative biologically plausible subgroup found by the heterogeneity screen.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise predicate screen over 72 single-feature predicates for dependency_BRAF.
analyses.result_summary: The strongest interpretable negative BRAF interaction found was `lineage=skin * myc_amplification=1`; the interaction contrast was -0.0522, much smaller than the `braf_v600e=1` main effect.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise predicate screen over 72 single-feature predicates for dependency_EGFR.
analyses.result_summary: The `egfr_amplification=1 * rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm<=4.230` interaction contrast was +0.0397, indicating low MYC expression weakens rather than strengthens EGFR-amplification dependency.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise predicate screen over 72 single-feature predicates for dependency_ERBB2.
analyses.result_summary: The largest small negative ERBB2 interaction was `lineage=colorectal * mutation_burden>=8.332` with contrast -0.0406, far weaker than the `erbb2_amplification=1` effect.

analyses.code: Systematic pairwise predicate screen over 72 single-feature predicates for dependency_KRAS.
analyses.result_summary: The strongest small negative KRAS interaction was `lineage_subtype=not_applicable * rnaseq_AXL_log2_tpm>=4.130` with contrast -0.0321; it did not displace `kras_mutation=1` as the final subgroup.

analyses.code: Systematic subgroup screen for dependency_RIT1, including lineage and nf1_loss pair predicates.
analyses.result_summary: The biologically plausible RIT1 subgroup `lineage=brain & nf1_loss=1` had mean -0.4047 versus -0.2650 in the complement; the signed difference was -0.1397.

proposed_hypotheses.text: For `dependency_KIF18A`, the final best-supported subgroup is `lineage=colorectal & apc_mutation=1 & smad4_loss=0`, with `smad4_loss=1` suppressing the dependency.

For `dependency_TMED10`, the best-supported subgroup from the systematic screen is high `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` plus high `cas9_activity_score`, with more negative dependency but small magnitude.
For `dependency_DHX9`, high `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` plus high `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` defines a more negative dependency subgroup.
For `dependency_POLR2A`, high `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` defines the clearest more negative subgroup, with pairwise molecular interactions weaker than the growth effect.
For `dependency_RPL11`, `myc_amplification=1` and high `copy_number_8q24` identify more negative dependency, and high growth plus `myc_amplification=1` is the strongest negative subgroup.

analyses.code: Systematic subgroup and pairwise interaction screen for dependency_KIF18A.
analyses.result_summary: `lineage=colorectal & apc_mutation=1 & smad4_loss=0` had mean -1.0922 versus -0.2527 in the complement; the signed difference was -0.8396.

analyses.code: Pairwise interaction contrast for lineage=colorectal and smad4_loss=1 on dependency_KIF18A.
analyses.result_summary: `smad4_loss=1` suppressed the colorectal KIF18A dependency, with an interaction contrast of +0.5714.

analyses.code: Systematic subgroup screen for dependency_TMED10.
analyses.result_summary: `cas9_activity_score>=1.080 & growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` had mean `dependency_TMED10` -0.2931 versus -0.2514 in the complement; the signed difference was -0.0417.

analyses.code: Systematic subgroup screen for dependency_DHX9.
analyses.result_summary: `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964 & rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm>=5.669` had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.3892 versus -0.3297 in the complement; the signed difference was -0.0595.

analyses.code: Systematic subgroup screen for dependency_POLR2A.
analyses.result_summary: `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` had mean `dependency_POLR2A` -0.4972 versus -0.3928 in the complement; the signed difference was -0.1043.

analyses.code: Systematic subgroup screen for dependency_RPL11.
analyses.result_summary: `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964 & myc_amplification=1` had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3936 versus -0.2632 in the complement; the signed difference was -0.1303.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Across all dependency outcomes, final best-supported subgroups are expected oncogene dependencies for `dependency_BRAF`, `dependency_EGFR`, `dependency_ERBB2`, and `dependency_KRAS`; `nf1_loss=1` for `dependency_RIT1`; `lineage=colorectal & apc_mutation=1 & smad4_loss=0` for `dependency_KIF18A`; growth or screen covariates for `dependency_TMED10` and `dependency_POLR2A`; and MYC/8q24-high states for `dependency_DHX9` and `dependency_RPL11`.

analyses.code: Final synthesis of systematic main-effect, subgroup, and pairwise interaction analyses across all 10 dependency outcomes.
analyses.result_summary: The largest biologically specific hidden subgroup was `lineage=colorectal & apc_mutation=1 & smad4_loss=0` for `dependency_KIF18A`, with signed effect -0.8396; this exceeded the magnitudes of other discovered interaction-defined dependencies.

analyses.code: Final synthesis of suppressor evidence for the KIF18A subgroup.
analyses.result_summary: `smad4_loss=1` specifically suppressed the colorectal KIF18A dependency; the colorectal-by-SMAD4-loss interaction contrast was +0.5714.
